_note: Demo patch definitions whose offsets/bytes match samples/synthetic_ecu.bin, so the load -> apply -> validate(FAIL) -> repair(PASS) -> export flow works out of the box. This is sample data, not real vehicle modifications; a real patch file is the user's own domain and is never committed to this repo (SCOPE.md).

patches.description: Demo byte override at the reserved patch-target region (0x1A2F0).
patches.original: AA BB CC DD EE FF 00 11

patches.description: Demo 2D map adjustment: clamp the first row of the 16x16 table at 0x1000.
patches.bytes: FF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
